editor.upload_hint: Click to upload images or drop them here
editor.upload_sub_hint: Supports JPG, PNG, GIF, WebP, and SVG. Imported resources are written into the card root directory.
editor.url_placeholder: Enter an image URL, for example https://example.com/photo.jpg
editor.drag_to_delete: Drag here to remove the image
editor.add_panel_hint: Click the gray plus tile to expand this area and continue importing local files or remote image URLs.
editor.empty_hint: No images yet. Upload files or add an image URL first.
layout.title: Layout settings
layout.spacing_none_desc: Images are flush with square corners.
layout.spacing_comfortable_desc: Images keep a modest gap with small rounded corners.
layout.grid_desc: Display multiple images in a balanced grid overview.
layout.long_scroll_desc: Expand images vertically in full sequence for comics, screenshots, and long captures.
layout.horizontal_scroll_desc: Arrange images in a horizontal gallery strip.
hint.single_auto: Only one image is present, so the card renders in single-image mode automatically.
error.invalid_url: The image URL is invalid. Use an http(s) address or a data:image URL.
error.unsupported_format: The image format is not supported.
error.image_not_found: Unable to resolve the image resource: {file}
